title: Gipples Galore
body:
![Gipples Galore Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QYfKDJOV/images/4aebb975665c14d9e5e57f4dbbd9c6c47f2d1ca5.png)
---

### Get ready for the Gipple! 
The mob everybody knows and loves, soon to be revealed at Minecraft Live 2022! Until the Gipple is added, this mod will have to suffice.

---

### Gipples are elusive creatures.
Gipples can be found dwelling within colonies inside caves. These colonies are very rare, but spawn more commonly under colder biomes and oceans. Inside of Gipple colonies, you can find the new gelatin blocks, gelatin layers, as well as the gelatite and amoebalith stone types! You'll find Gipples slumbering within blocks of gelatin. Break the blocks to awaken them.

---

### Gipples love to eat glow lichen.
Be it in block or item form, glow lichen is the Gipple's source of food. After eating, Gipples can produce gelatin layers, which can be harvested for tasty gelatin you can eat! However, if you feed a Gipple more glow lichen before it has the chance to produce gelatin, it will divide itself into 2 baby Gipples.

*(Note: Beware, on the rare occasion that an unforeseen turn of events takes place during gipplication, it is strongly advised to evacuate the area and never come back.)*

---
